channel.title: GitHub Unknown languages Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Unknown languages in GitHub

item.title: ByteByteGoHq/system-design-101
item.description: Explain complex systems using visuals and simple terms. Help you prepare for system design interviews.

item.title: skills/hello-github-actions
item.description: Create a GitHub Action and use it in a workflow.

item.title: trimstray/the-book-of-secret-knowledge
item.description: A collection of inspiring lists, manuals, cheatsheets, blogs, hacks, one-liners, cli/web tools and more.

item.title: n8n-io/self-hosted-ai-starter-kit
item.description: The Self-hosted AI Starter Kit is an open-source template that quickly sets up a local AI environment. Curated by n8n, it provides essential tools for creating secure, self-hosted AI workflows.

item.title: skills/introduction-to-github
item.description: Get started using GitHub in less than an hour.

item.title: skills/github-pages
item.description: Create a site or blog from your GitHub repositories with GitHub Pages.

item.title: skills/copilot-codespaces-vscode
item.description: Develop with AI-powered code suggestions using GitHub Copilot and VS Code

item.title: PatrickJS/awesome-cursorrules
item.description: 📄 A curated list of awesome .cursorrules files

item.title: getify/You-Dont-Know-JS
item.description: A book series on JavaScript. @YDKJS on twitter.

item.title: akullpp/awesome-java
item.description: A curated list of awesome frameworks, libraries and software for the Java programming language.

item.title: sindresorhus/awesome
item.description: 😎 Awesome lists about all kinds of interesting topics
